## defineConstraints() function

Creates a constraint configuration directly from an object. Useful for programmatic configuration without YAML.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function defineConstraints(config: ConstraintConfig): ResolvedConstraintConfig;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

config


</td><td>

[ConstraintConfig](./constraints.constraintconfig.md)


</td><td>

Partial constraint configuration


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[ResolvedConstraintConfig](./constraints.resolvedconstraintconfig.md)

Complete configuration with defaults applied

## Example


```ts
const config = defineConstraints({
  fieldTypes: {
    dynamicEnum: 'error',
    dynamicSchema: 'error',
  },
  layout: {
    group: 'error',
  },
});
```
